All the best,

day3_bumps.due_calculation: Day 3 from Wednesday 2026-05-06 = Saturday 2026-05-09 — weekend, no send.

day3_bumps.brain_decision_required: BRAIN runs FRIDAY 2026-05-09 to confirm Day-3 send date. Friday preference: avoids leads going cold over weekend. But Friday reply rate lower than Tuesday/Wednesday — BRAIN to weigh up on Friday run.
day3_bumps.type: Short thread reply (reply to original email thread)
day3_bumps.template:
[First name],

Just wanted to make sure this didn't get buried.

[One sentence restating specific issue — e.g. 'The Not Secure warning on [URL] is still showing.']

[Your name]
day3_bumps.rules: 3-4 lines only. Same thread. Brief bump — not a restatement. IMAP before each.
day3_bumps.brain_run_required: Friday 2026-05-09 — BRAIN generates per-lead Day-3 copy and confirms send date.

pivot_rules.if_day0_was_ssl: Day-7: Google ranking impact of Not Secure OR missing/incomplete Google Business Profile. NEVER repeat SSL angle.

pivot_rules.if_day0_was_no_website: Day-7: competitors ranking for keyword, OR estimated missed enquiries per month.
pivot_rules.rule: Day-7 MUST be a different pain point. Tom's conversion came from a genuine new angle.
